calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY, SAN FRANCISCO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT, AND CHRISTIANE HAYASHI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Ralph Jacobson (455.4795) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona; Wayne K. Snodgrass of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4675) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained without leave to amend. San Francisco Transportation Code 1122(g) is subject to the rational basis test. The ordinance furthers the valid legislative purposes of customer convenience, customer safety, and the avoidance of customer confusion. The ordinance does not violate principles of equal protection or due process. The ordinance is not arbitrary even though other cash-based industries are not subject to the same requirement. (Berry v. Hannigan, (1992) 7 Cal.App.4th 587, 592). Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Continued To May-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - RALPH JACOBSON, TEL. NO. 455-4795, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. WAYNE K. SNODGRASS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4675 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend. Amended complaint to be filed by February 22, 2012. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)
